title: carlemanniaceae
intro: The carlemanniaceae rank, also known as the Carlemanniaceae family, is a taxonomic grouping of flowering plants within the larger plant kingdom. It is a small family of flowering plants, consisting of a limited number of genera and species. The Carlemanniaceae family is native to parts of Asia and is characterized by its unique characteristics and adaptations. The family is part of the larger plant classification system and plays an important role in the understanding of plant diversity and relationships.
